reason: Natasha models are NOT embedded in pip packages - they download from internet on first use, violating offline-first requirement

security_issue.problem: navec/slovnet packages contain only code, models download at runtime (~50MB from internet)
security_issue.impact: Breaks offline-first guarantee for production deployment
security_issue.user_note: Однократная загрузка НЕ нарушает безопасность ПД (данные не передаются наружу), НО нарушает требование offline-first для production

future_enablement.step_1: Download models during development: python -m navec download news
future_enablement.step_4: Configure Natasha to load from bundled paths instead of auto-download
future_enablement.step_5: Test in offline environment to verify no internet access required
